response:
the review conveys a positive sentiment. the reviewer expresses enthusiasm about the book, stating that they thought they were getting the story of the deer but were actually introduced to a different narrative. they highlight the engaging nature of the characters and the overall quality of the book, which they describe as one of the best they have ever read.

the review also acknowledges that the book is not the same as the well-known bambi story, but this is not seen as a negative point. the reviewer is clearly impressed by the book and recommends it to others, even though they have not read the entire book. the overall tone is positive and encouraging.
